chapter.summary: Source text for 1 Corinthians 2 in Eastern Greek Orthodox Bible.

verses.text: God’s Wisdom - The Spirit of God When I came to you, brethren, I did not come with excellence of speech or wisdom, proclaiming to you the testimony of God.
Indeed, I resolved not to know anything among you, except Jesus Christ, and him crucified.
I was with you in weakness, in fear, and in much trembling.d
My speech and my preaching were not in persuasive words of humane wisdom but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power, 5so that your faith would not stand by human wisdom but in the power of God.
However, we [do] speak wisdom among those who are full grown; yet it is a wisdom ‘not of
